ACTIVITY_ADD_DESC: Select an activity type from the dropdown, then click Add Text to enter the activity message.
ACTIVITY_EDIT_DESC: Change the activity type from the dropdown or click Edit Text to modify the message.
ACTIVITY_MODE_ORDERED_DESC: Cycle through the list in order
ALL_TRACKS_FAILED: No playable tracks found in the queue.
BOT_NOT_IN_VOICE: Bot is not in a voice channel.
CLEAR_MINE_EMPTY: You have no tracks in the queue.
CLEAR_MINE_SUCCESS: 🧹 Removed {count} of your tracks from the queue.
CLEAR_USER_EMPTY: That user has no tracks in the queue.
CMD_DESC_CLEAR: Clear all items in the queue
CMD_DESC_HELP: Shows all available commands and features.
CMD_DESC_JOIN: Summon the bot to your voice channel
CMD_DESC_MOVE: Move a track to a new position
CMD_DESC_PLAY: Play a link or search term
CMD_DESC_PREVIOUS: Play the previous track from history.
CMD_DESC_RADIO: Start a radio session based on a seed track
CMD_DESC_REMOVE: Remove a track from the queue
CMD_DESC_SEARCH: Search YouTube and pick a result
CMD_DESC_SEEK: Seek to a timestamp in the current track
CMD_DESC_SHUFFLE: Shuffle the queue order (leave empty to shuffle all)
CMD_DESC_STOP: Stop playback and clear the queue
CMD_DESC_TIMEOUT: Temporarily block a user from using the bot. For permanent restrictions use /settings
EMBED_LAYOUT_REFRESH_WARNING: Disabling the refresh button is not recommended. Embeds can become stale and may not update automatically.
EXCLUDED_CANNOT_OWNER: You cannot exclude the server owner.
EXCLUDED_USER: You are not allowed to use music commands in this server.
FORCE_PERM_ADMIN_DESC: Only admins and the server owner can use forced play
FORCE_PERM_DJ_DESC: Users with DJ role or admin privileges can use forced play
FORCE_PERM_OWNER_DESC: Only the server owner can use forced play
FORCE_PLAY_NO_PERM: You don't have permission to use forced play.
FORCE_RADIO_DISABLED: Forced play is disabled during radio mode.
FORCE_RADIO_SINGLE: Radio mode is active - only the first track will be played, the rest won't be queued.
HELP_ADMIN_TIMEOUT: Temporarily block a user from using the bot. Admin only. For permanent restrictions use settings.
HELP_CAT_ADMIN_DESC: All configurable bot settings and access levels.
HELP_CAT_DJ_VOTING_DESC: DJ privileges and the voting system.
HELP_CAT_MANAGE_DESC: Bot owner tools and admin commands.
HELP_CAT_PLAYLIST_DESC: Personal playlists with an interactive view.
HELP_CMD_CLEAR: Clears the entire queue, your own tracks (`mine`), or a specific user's tracks (`user`). Vote-based for full clear.
HELP_CMD_HISTORY: View recently played songs. History size is configurable in settings (0 to disable).
HELP_CMD_JOIN: Brings the bot to your voice channel.
HELP_CMD_LOOP: Modes: `off` (no repeat), `song` (repeat current), `queue` (repeat entire queue). Vote-based.
HELP_CMD_MOVE: Move a single track or a range to a new position. Use optional `to_index` for ranges. Vote-based.
HELP_CMD_NOW: Opens the music player with interactive buttons for all playback controls.
HELP_CMD_PAUSE_RESUME: Permission depends on guild settings: everyone, track requester + DJ (default), admin/DJ only, or server owner only.
HELP_CMD_PLAY: URL, search term, or Spotify link. Supports playlists and albums. Optional: `shuffle` before adding, `forced` to skip current and play immediately (cancels any in-progress playlist loading), `hours`/`minutes`/`seconds` to start at a position.
HELP_CMD_PREVIOUS: Plays the previous track from history. Requires history to be enabled in settings. Track requester auto-passes, otherwise vote-based.
HELP_CMD_QUEUE: Paginated queue view with page navigation, go-to-page, search, and refresh buttons.
HELP_CMD_REMOVE: Remove by index, range (`index` + `index_to`), or `search` keyword. Search removal is DJ/admin only.
HELP_CMD_SEARCH: Search YouTube and pick from paginated results. 3-minute timeout.
HELP_CMD_SEEK: Specify hours, minutes, and/or seconds. Leave all empty to seek to start. Seek limits per track are configurable in settings.
HELP_CMD_SELECT: Jump to a track in the queue by its number. Vote-based.
HELP_CMD_SHUFFLE: Shuffle the entire queue or a specific range using optional `from`/`to`. Vote-based.
HELP_CMD_STOP: Stops playback and clears the entire queue. Vote-based. Optional: `{opt_current}` to cancel in-progress playlist loading without stopping playback (DJ+).
HELP_DJ_CAN:
**What DJs can do:**
• Bypass all votes - skip, stop, clear, shuffle, move, remove, select, and loop pass instantly
• Pause/resume and seek anyone's track (no seek limit)
• Remove tracks by search keyword
• Move the bot between voice channels
• Disconnect the bot with `/{cmd_leave}`
• Use forced play (when permitted in settings)
• Start and edit radio sessions (when permitted in settings)
HELP_DJ_WHAT:
**What is a DJ?**
DJs are trusted users who can control playback without voting. A user is a DJ if they have the designated DJ role, are added as an individual DJ user, or have the Manage Server permission.

DJ role and individual DJ users are configured via `/{cmd_settings}`.
HELP_MANAGE_CMD:
App owner only. Shows a status overview (guilds, voice connections, active views, latency) with a dropdown to run actions:
• **Ping** - Bot and voice latency
• **Reset voice** - Force-reset voice connection and playback state
• **Clear votes** - Clear all pending votes
• **Reload settings / locales** - Refresh from database or disk
• **Cancel fetches** - Cancel stuck background playlist loading
• **Purge stale** - Clean up data from servers the bot has left
• **Garbage collect** - Run Python garbage collector
• **Force resync** - Delete sync hash so commands resync on next restart
• **Auto-update settings** - Configure automatic package and bot code updates, schedule, timezone and restart
HELP_OVERVIEW_DESC:
A feature-rich music bot supporting anything yt-dlp can play (YouTube, SoundCloud, Bandcamp, direct links, and more). Spotify tracks, albums, and playlists are also supported, they are matched on YouTube and streamed from there.

Choose a category from the dropdown below to learn more.
HELP_PL_LIMITS: **Limits:** Up to {max_playlists} playlists per user, each holding up to {max_tracks} tracks. Both limits are configurable in settings (0 playlists = disabled).
HELP_PL_OVERVIEW:
Use `/playlist` with no options to open the **interactive playlist view**, a full panel with buttons and dropdowns for managing your playlists.

The view includes: page navigation, add/remove/move tracks, play/shuffle, search within playlist, create/delete/rename/clear playlists, set favourites, share to channel, export/import as JSON, copy others' playlists, and manage another user's playlists (admin).
HELP_PL_SLASH:
You can also use slash command options directly:
• `add` - Add a URL or search term
• `add_from` - Add current track or entire queue
• `play` / `play_shuffle` - Play a playlist normally or shuffled
• `create` / `delete` - Create or delete a playlist
• `favourite` - Set default playlist
• `share` - Post playlist in the channel
• `edit_name` - Rename a playlist
• `select_list` - Target a specific playlist
• `show` - Show a specific playlist
• `manage_guild` - View another user's playlists (admin only)
HELP_RADIO: Start a radio session that continuously plays related music based on a seed track. Seed from the current queue, play history, or a search/link. Optional track and time limits. Use again while active to edit the session.
HELP_SETTINGS_APPOWNER:
**App owner only settings:**
• **Silent Log** - Suppress console output
• **Bot Activity** - Activity status text list with static, random, or ordered cycling and custom interval

App owners can open `/{cmd_settings}` on any guild. If not a guild admin, only app-owner settings are visible.
HELP_SETTINGS_EMBED_VIEWS:
**Embed Views** sub-menu:
• **Embed Color** - Color for all bot embeds (25 presets + custom hex)
• **MP Buttons** - Toggle and reorder music player buttons, compact mode
• **MP Display** - Toggle and reorder music player embed fields
• **Queue Buttons** - Toggle and reorder queue view buttons, compact mode
• **Queue Display** - Normal or spacious mode, tracks per page
• **View Restrict** - Restrict bot views to a specific channel with configurable restriction levels
HELP_SETTINGS_LIMITS:
**Limits** sub-menu:
• **Max Playlists** - Playlists per user (0 = disabled)
• **Song History** - Recently played tracks to keep (0 = off)
• **Track Limit** - Per-user queue add cap. Separate limits for users, DJs, and admins `[guild owner for admin limit]`. Also includes queue limit and playlist track limit
• **Limit Usage** `[guild owner]` - Exclude specific users or roles from using any music commands
• **Pause & Seek** - Pause permission (everyone / requester+DJ / admin / owner), seek permission, seek limit per track, separate DJ seek limit
HELP_SETTINGS_LIMITS2:
• **Radio Settings** - Start and edit permissions (DJ / admin / owner), per-user cooldown
• **Forced Play** - Who can use `forced` in `/{cmd_play}` (DJ / admin / owner), whether forced play is allowed during active radio
• **Live Playback** - Enable/disable live streams, who can play them, max duration before auto-skip. When set to owner only, admins cannot change these settings
• **Bot Connection** - Idle disconnect timeout, join restriction level and channels `[guild owner]`
• **Performance** `[app owner]` - Track pre-fetch, safe pre-fetch, max download workers
HELP_SETTINGS_MAIN:
Admin only. Opens an interactive panel with dropdown menus. Supports **export/import** as JSON and **reset to defaults**.

• **Language** - Bot response language (31 locales)
• **Vote Mode** - Half or Half + 1 vote threshold
• **DJ** - DJ role and individual DJ users
• **Auto-Delete** - Delete bot responses after X seconds (0 = off)
• **Timezone** - Guild timezone offset for displayed timestamps
HELP_SETTINGS_PERMS:
**Manage Perms** sub-menu `[guild owner]`:
• **Admin Privilege** - Toggle whether Manage Guild permission grants admin access
• **Admin Users** - Individual users with admin access
• **Admin Roles** - Roles that grant admin access
HELP_VOTE_HOW:
**How voting works:**
Actions like skip, previous, stop, clear, shuffle, move, remove, select, loop, and pause (when set to everyone) require votes from listeners in the voice channel.

• **Half** - Votes needed = half of listeners (rounded up)
• **Half + 1** (default) - Votes needed = half of listeners + 1 (stricter)

The vote mode is configurable via `/{cmd_settings}`. If only 1 listener is in the channel, all actions pass immediately.
HELP_VOTE_OWNER:
**Track requester privileges:**
The user who added the current track can skip and use previous without voting. They can also seek their own track without being a DJ. Pause/resume depends on guild pause settings.
HELP_VOTE_RESET:
**When votes reset:**
• **Per-track votes** (skip, previous, select, remove, move, pause) reset when a new track starts playing
• **All votes** are cleared when the bot stops, leaves, or the bot owner uses **Clear votes** from `/{cmd_manage}`
• A passing vote clears that action's votes for the guild

RADIO_COOLDOWN_DESC: After a radio session ends, whether by vote, manual stop, or reaching its limit, this cooldown prevents the same user from immediately starting a new one. DJs and admins are not affected.
RADIO_EDIT_DESC: Radio is currently active. You can change source, restart, or stop the session.
RADIO_EDIT_PERM_ADMIN_DESC: Only admins and the server owner can edit a live radio
RADIO_EDIT_PERM_DJ_DESC: DJs and admins can edit/stop a live radio session
RADIO_EDIT_PERM_OWNER_DESC: Only the server owner can edit a live radio session
RADIO_FETCH_FAILED: Failed to fetch radio tracks. The seed may not have related music.
RADIO_FOOTER_REFILL_FAILED: Refill failed, ending after remaining tracks
RADIO_HISTORY_DISABLED: Play history is disabled for this server.

RADIO_LIMITS_TIME_DESC: Stop after a number of minutes ({min}-{max})
RADIO_LIMITS_TRACK_DESC: Stop after a number of tracks ({min}-{max})

RADIO_PERM_ADMIN_DESC: Only admins and the server owner can start a radio
RADIO_PERM_DJ_DESC: Only users with the DJ role or admin can start a radio

SEEK_PERM_REQUESTER_DJ_DESC: Only the requester, DJs, or admins can seek (default)
SETTINGS_BOT_RESET_CONFIRM_DESC:
This will reset **all** bot-wide settings (activity, prefetch, workers, silent log) to their default values. This action cannot be undone.

Consider exporting your bot settings first.
SETTINGS_DESC_BOT_ACTIVITY: Manage the bot's activity status. Add multiple activities and cycle through them automatically, or set a static one.
SETTINGS_DESC_BOT_CONNECTION:
Configure idle disconnect timeout and channel join restrictions.
Select allowed voice channels below, the bot will only join those channels. The restriction level controls who can bypass this and bring the bot to other channels.
SETTINGS_DESC_DELETE_AFTER: Auto-delete bot command responses after this many seconds (minimum 5). Set to 0 to disable auto-deletion.
SETTINGS_DESC_DJ:
Set a DJ role or toggle individual DJ users. Select again to remove.

DJs bypass vote requirements for all music commands (skip, remove, move, clear, pause, seek, etc.) but cannot change server settings or manage other users' playlists.
SETTINGS_DESC_EMBED_COLOR: Set the accent color used in all bot embeds (now playing, queue, playlists, etc.).
SETTINGS_DESC_EMBED_VIEW_SETTINGS: Customize music player and queue buttons, queue display, embed color, and view restrictions.
SETTINGS_DESC_FORCE_PLAY:
Configure who can use forced play to skip the current track and play something immediately. When a playlist is provided, the first track plays instantly and the rest are added to the start of the queue.

During radio mode, forced play is disabled by default. When enabled, only a single track is allowed, playlists are not queued to avoid disrupting the radio session. Forced tracks are not counted toward the radio's track limit and don't affect the radio's track pool.
SETTINGS_DESC_LANGUAGE: Choose the language for all bot responses in this server.
SETTINGS_DESC_LIMITS: Configure playlist, history, track limits, command usage restrictions, and bot connection settings.
SETTINGS_DESC_LIMIT_USAGE: Exclude specific users or roles from using any music commands. Server owner is always exempt.
SETTINGS_DESC_LIVE_PLAYBACK: Control live stream playback permissions, who can play them, and maximum duration.
SETTINGS_DESC_MANAGE_PERMS: Controls who has admin and DJ privileges in the bot. Toggle admin privilege to control whether Discord's Manage Server permission grants admin access. When disabled, Manage Server users still retain DJ-level privileges. Add specific users or roles for fine-grained control.
SETTINGS_DESC_MAX_HISTORY: Maximum number of songs to keep in history. Set to 0 to disable.
SETTINGS_DESC_MAX_PLAYLISTS: Maximum number of personal playlists each user can create in this server. Set to 0 to disable playlists entirely.
SETTINGS_DESC_MP_DISPLAY: Choose which information fields appear in the music player embed and their display order.
SETTINGS_DESC_PAUSE_CONTROL: Configure who can use the pause button and how long the bot waits before disconnecting when paused.
SETTINGS_DESC_PERFORMANCE:
Controls for bot performance tuning.

**Pre-fetch** pre-loads the next track while the current one plays, making transitions near-instant. Disable it if your VPS has limited CPU or you experience audio stutter during playlist adds.

**Safe Pre-fetch** pauses pre-fetch while any /play command or background playlist loading is active, so they never run at the same time. Prevents CPU spikes on shared/burstable VPS. Enabled by default.

**Max Workers** limits how many yt-dlp calls can run at the same time. Each call spawns a JS runtime for signature decryption. On burstable/shared VPS (e.g. Oracle free tier), running too many at once can trigger CPU throttling and cause audio stutter. Lower this to 1-2 if you experience issues, or keep the default for dedicated hardware.
SETTINGS_DESC_QUEUE_DISPLAY: Configure how many tracks are shown per page in queue, playlist, and shared views (5-15). Toggle compact mode to reduce spacing between tracks. Use the footer fields dropdown to show or hide total queue duration and playback elapsed time in the queue footer.
SETTINGS_DESC_RADIO:
Configure who can use `/radio` and the cooldown between sessions.

⚠️ Setting permission to **Everyone** means any user can start a radio, which takes over the queue and plays continuously. Other users can only stop it through a vote. Recommended: **DJ / Admin** or higher.
SETTINGS_DESC_SILENT_LOG: Suppress FFmpeg and yt-dlp console output for cleaner server logs. Does not affect bot messages in Discord.
SETTINGS_DESC_TIMEZONE: Set the server timezone offset. This affects how times are displayed by the bot.
SETTINGS_DESC_TRACK_LIMIT: Maximum number of tracks a user can have in the queue. Set to 0 to disable.
SETTINGS_DESC_VIEW_RESTRICT: Restrict now playing and queue views to a specific channel and control who can use them.
SETTINGS_DESC_VOTE_MODE: Choose how many votes are required for actions like skip, stop, shuffle, and remove.
SETTINGS_IMPORT_FILE_DESC: Upload a previously exported .json settings file.
SETTINGS_RESET_CONFIRM_DESC:
This will reset **all** guild settings to their default values. This action cannot be undone.

Consider exporting your guild settings first.
SHUFFLE_NEED_TWO: Need at least 2 tracks to shuffle.
SHUFFLE_PLAY_DESC: Enable to shuffle tracks before adding to queue, otherwise they will be added in order.
SKIP_NO_INFO: No info for the current track; cannot skip.

SPOTIFY_ERROR: Unable to load Spotify tracks. Please try again later.
SPOTIFY_NO_MATCH: Spotify link could not be resolved.
TIMEOUT_SET: {user} has been timed out for {minutes} minute(s).
TRACKS_SKIPPED_FAILED: ⚠️ {count} track(s) could not be loaded and were skipped.
TRACK_LIMIT_CLEAR_ADMIN_SKIPPED: Cleared user and DJ track limits. Admin-privileged limit can only be cleared by the server owner.
USER_TIMED_OUT: You are timed out from using music commands. Expires {remaining}.
USER_TRACK_LIMIT: You've reached your track limit for this queue.
VIEW_USER_BLOCKED: You don't have permission to use this view.
VOICE_CONNECT_FAILED: Failed to connect to the voice channel. Please try again.
VOTE_NEED_JOIN: Join a voice channel before voting.
YOUTUBE_FETCH_ERROR: Failed to load remaining playlist tracks from YouTube.
YTDLP_AGE_RESTRICTED: This content is age-restricted and requires a cookies file to play.
YTDLP_COOKIE_STALE: YouTube cookies have expired or been invalidated. Please update your cookies file.
YTDLP_NO_JS_RUNTIME: YouTube requires a JavaScript runtime but none was found.
